data.title: India keeps cotton duty off just as U.S. tariffs hit harder than ever
data.description:
India has extended its waiver on import duty for cotton by three months, pushing the deadline to Dec. 31, a government order showed on Thursday. The move is aimed at helping the country’s garment makers, who are under stress from steep U. S. tariffs. Global cotton prices turned higher after the decision, reversing earlier losses to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/india-cotton-import-waiver-extended/

data.title: Solana Trader Count Plummets 81% as “Meme Coin Craze” Turns Toxic
data.description:
The Solana ecosystem has seen trader participation collapse as the meme boom cools. Daily active DEX users dropped 81%, most new tokens vanish within hours, and celebrity-linked scams have cost wallets millions, even as Solana still leads Ethereum in trading volume.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/solana-trader-count-plummets-81-as-meme-coin-craze-turns-toxic/

data.title: Trump to Launch $40B WLFI Token September 1
data.description:
September 1 could mark a KEY moment in DeFi’s recent history as World Liberty Financial prepares to unlock the first batch of WLFI tokens, part of a project closely tied to President Donald Trump. The token, built on Ethereum, will be distributed through a system called Lockbox. Early backers who purchased tokens at $0. 015 and $0. 05 […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/trump-to-launch-his-40b-wlfi-cryptocurrency-on-september-1/

data.title: Everclear Launches TRON Network Support, Bringing Capital-Efficient Rebalancing to Top Stablecoin Network
data.description:
George Town, Cayman Islands – August 28, 2025 – Everclear, the cross-chain clearing and settlement protocol dedicated to eliminating liquidity fragmentation for blockchains and digital assets, announced an integration with the TRON network. This integration facilitates the settlement of onchain transactions without the need for centralized exchanges or fragmented routes, essentially solving liquidity fragmentation for […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/everclear-launches-tron-network-support-bringing-capital-efficient-rebalancing-to-top-stablecoin-network/

data.title: Federal Reserve September Rate Cut Probability Rises to 87.3% After Unemployment Data
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from CME's "FedWatch" indicates that following the release of initial jobless claims figures, the probability of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in September is now at 87.3%. The likelihood of maintaining the current rate stands at 12.7%.

Earlier reports highlighted that the number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending August 23 was 229,000, slightly below the expected 230,000. The previous figure was revised from 235,000 to 234,000.

data.title: EU Proposes Tariff Removal on U.S. Industrial Goods
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the European Commission has proposed eliminating import tariffs on U.S. industrial goods as part of a trade agreement with the United States. This proposal aims to reduce tariffs imposed by the U.S. on European automobiles retroactively. The initiative marks the first step in implementing the framework agreement reached between U.S. President Donald Trump and European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen on July 27. Under this agreement, the EU has accepted a broad 15% tariff to avoid a disruptive trade war. The U.S. has agreed to lower tariffs on EU-produced cars from 27.5% to 15%, effective from August 1, the first day of the month when the EU legislative proposal was submitted.

data.title: Caliber shares up 77% on LINK treasury news amid Nasdaq probe
data.description:

source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/caliber-stock-chainlink-treasury-nasdaq-delist-risk?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
